subject: Properties of Expectation
topic: §47 Covariance, Variance of Sums, and Correlations
question: Let $X$ and $Y$ be continuous random variables with joint density function $$f_{XY}(x,y) = \begin{cases} \frac{8}{3}xy & 0\le x\le 1,\ x\le y\le 2x \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$$ Find $\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)$.
